reset_description: Resets the tutorial and shows it again the next time you open the dashboard.
dont_show_again: Don't show this tutorial again on next start

confirm_close.title: End tutorial?
confirm_close.body: Do you want to end the tutorial completely or just look around?

welcome.title: Welcome to MyBaby
welcome.description: Get familiar with the app in under 2 minutes. You can replay this tutorial anytime via your profile.

dashboard_tiles.title: Your baby's daily overview
dashboard_tiles.description: The tiles show your key data at a glance — last feeding, sleep, diaper and more. Tap a tile to jump into the detail view.

range_tabs.title: Pick a time range
range_tabs.description: Switch between Today / 7 days / 14 days / All to spot trends. Each range shows a different breakdown of your data.

burger_intro.title: Mobile navigation
burger_intro.description: On mobile you reach your profile through the menu at the top right.
burger_intro.description_admin: On mobile you reach Settings through the menu at the top right.
burger_intro.description_sleep: On mobile you reach the Sleep plug-in through the menu at the top right.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.description_desktop: Your profile lives here — timezone, language, quick actions, tutorial. You can replay this tutorial anytime via Profile > Restart tutorial.
profile.description_mobile: Your profile lives here in the menu — timezone, language, quick actions, tutorial.
profile.action_mobile: You can open your profile now and resume the tutorial afterwards.

admin.title: Settings
admin.description_desktop: All admin functions live here: add children, enable plug-ins, configure alerts.
admin.description_mobile: All admin functions live here: add children, enable plug-ins, configure alerts.

admin_overview.title: Settings overview
admin_overview.description: From here you can manage your child(ren), maintain a central medication list, configure alerts or manage stored media.
admin_overview.action: Tap Plug-ins to configure the app's features.

plugins_intro.title: Plug-ins
plugins_intro.description:
The app adapts to you. On this page you can enable the features you want and decide what appears on the home dashboard.

'Home' toggle = widget visibility on dashboard. 'Active' toggle = feature on/off.

plugins_explore.title: Explore plug-ins
plugins_explore.description: Take a moment to explore the plug-in admin page.
plugins_explore.action: To look around, close this window with the X. You can resume afterwards.

sleep_link.title: Continue to Sleep
sleep_link.description_desktop: Next we'll look at one plug-in in detail — Sleep.
sleep_link.description_mobile: Next we'll look at one plug-in in detail — Sleep.

sleep_new_btn.title: Capture a sleep entry
sleep_new_btn.description: Use the 'New' button to capture a sleep entry or start a timer.

sleep_tabs.title: Entries and Overview
sleep_tabs.description: The 'Entries' tab shows entries for Today, 7 days, 14 days or All. Many features also have an 'Overview' tab with recommendations and reference values.
sleep_tabs.action: Tap a tab to try it out.

sleep_filter.title: Filter entries
sleep_filter.description: Many features capture entries with specific attributes. Use the menu to filter them.

sleep_stats.title: Useful averages
sleep_stats.description: Averages from your tracked data give you a sense of how your baby is developing and what to watch.

sleep_edit.title: Edit entries
sleep_edit.description: You can edit any entry with the pencil or delete it with the trash icon.
sleep_edit.action: You've learned the key features. Now let's add your child.

add_child.title: Add a child
add_child.description: Add your first child to start capturing data. The tutorial pauses while you fill in the form — once you save, it continues automatically.

success.title: Congratulations — you're ready 🎉
success.description:
You've successfully added your child and can start capturing data.

If you have questions or feedback, please reach out.

fab.title: Quick capture
fab.description: Tap the floating plus button to quickly capture a new entry.
